note: The eng-lead reads this to pick the next task (highest-priority status:ready). The 'real-data wiring' initiative (P1-P22) replaces all mocked/hardcoded frontend data with real DB-backed data. Full detail: specs/real-data-wiring-plan.md. Mirror of the Looper - Product Board. Downstream items are status:blocked until their depends_on ships; the eng-lead flips them to ready as deps land. type: minor=silent (backend/infra/tests, no owner ping) | major=noticeable (user-visible on TestFlight, rolls into an approval bundle).

items.title: Wire Alembic + migration 005 core scoring schema + ORM (Postgres/RDS)
items.why: No relational tables exist for the core scoring domain (players/rounds/scores/tournaments live in JSON). Unblocks the whole initiative. RDS is already up (DATABASE_URL on EC2 + Secrets Manager); set up Alembic, baseline caddie schema 001-004, then author 005 as the first revision; apply on the EC2 deploy box.

items.title: Align frontend lib/api.ts to the real backend contract (kill silent localStorage fallback)
items.why: api.ts uses snake_case + PATCH + nonexistent endpoints, so storage-api.ts always silently falls back to localStorage. Until this lands, backend fixes are invisible in the app.

items.title: Players CRUD on Postgres (drop seed_default_data)
Rounds + normalized scores/players/groups on Postgres
Tournaments on Postgres (round links survive restart)
Scoring-courses on Postgres (resolve course-identity duality)
GET/POST/PUT /api/profile/golfer backed by new golfer_profiles table
items.why: Decision: new golfer_profiles table, distinct from caddie player_profiles.

items.title: Games in normalized games table, round/tournament-scoped (no standalone /api/games)
items.resolution: Satisfied by backend-rounds-scores-db + backend-tournaments-db + api-contract-align: normalized games table (mig 005), round/tournament-scoped CRUD via those endpoints, Game.teams/roundId parity added, and standalone /api/games client funcs removed. No separate endpoint needed (decision E4). No build required.
items.why: Decision: normalized games table (FK round/tournament), managed via round/tournament endpoints; delete imagined getGame/createGame from api.ts.

items.title: Backfill data/*.json into Postgres, then retire JSON storage
Round setup: real VoiceRoundSetup/CourseSearch/PlayerAutocomplete -> POST /api/rounds
In-round scoring loads + persists per stroke to backend
Leaderboard computed from real scores via lib/games.ts (drop LB_MOCK)
Home shows real recent rounds + handicap/stats; fix tournament link
Profile masthead + handicap from /api/profile/golfer
Profile 'the bag' from real club distances
Profile strokes-gained / scoring-by-tee / year-log from real rounds
items.rescope_note: RE-SCOPED 2026-06-27: ScoringByTee + YearLog ARE computable from real getRounds() now -> wire them. StrokesGained + FairwayFan need per-shot data (blocked P28) -> replace fabricated mock with HONEST empty states (no fake numbers, owner rule). Removes the last Preview-only mock on profile.
items.done_note: Re-scoped: ScoringByTee (bucketed by tee x holeCount, per-round toPar avg) + Season log now real from getRounds. StrokesGained+FairwayFan merged into one honest ShotAnalytics placeholder at page bottom (no fabricated numbers). Removed contradicting Recent stub. Reviewer SHIP + designer polish-then-ship; 11 findings folded; gates verified incl. vitest 238. players[0]=owner risk tracked as P34.

items.title: Players page -> /api/players (drop storage seeds)
Tournament detail fetched by id + computed standings (delete tournamentData.ts)
Tournament creation persists via API (not localStorage)
Remove 'Load Sample Players' demo seeding from settings
Implement real match-play Nassau scoring (currently stubbed)
items.why: Games engine is isolated and test-covered; match-play Nassau just shows stroke totals today. Buildable independently of the DB work.

items.title: Tee-time REAL integration (phased: deep-links -> provider slots -> auto-booking)
items.why: Owner chose real integration (not a demo). Phase 1 (ready once api-contract-align lands): real course search + GolfNow/course booking deep-links, no gated API. Phase 2 (live slots via GolfNow Affiliate API) and Phase 3 (auto-booking via Lightspeed/foreUP) are blocked on owner-supplied provider credentials.
items.blocked_on_owner: Phases 2-3 only: GolfNow Affiliate & Partner API creds; Lightspeed/foreUP partner creds. Phase 1 needs no creds.

items.title: Voice parser: fix 'for'->4 in regex + 'dbl bogey' everyone-pattern (found by unit tests)
items.why: test-voice-pipeline found two real bugs in parseVoiceScoresLocally: (1) 'for' (STT for four) is in WORD_TO_NUM but missing from the first/second-pass regex alternations, so 'with a for' yields no score; (2) 'everybody dbl bogey' matches the everyone-regex but the value selector checks t.includes('double') not 'dbl', returning par+1 instead of par+2. Fix both + flip the documenting unit tests to assert correct behavior. Noticeable (voice score behavior) -> goes in the next bundle AFTER #51 ships, not folded into the pending approval.

items.title: Restyle GameResults.tsx + GameLeaderboards.tsx to yardage-book (still dark-mode SaaS)
items.why: Designer flagged (games-matchplay-nassau review): these two user-facing game-result components are entirely dark-mode Tailwind (zinc gradients, emerald/amber rank circles, Lucide Trophy, text-white) — a NORTHSTAR violation predating the wiring work. The in-round LeaderboardSheet (what golfers see during play) is already on-paper; these post-round/standings views are not. Restyle to T.* tokens matching the rest of the app. No logic changes.

items.title: Restyle reachable dark components (auth) — most flagged dark files are DEAD/unmounted
items.why: REACHABILITY AUDIT (2026-06-27): of the ~21 dark-Tailwind components, almost all are DEAD CODE / UNMOUNTED legacy from the pre-yardage-book prototype, superseded by the wired screens. Dead subtrees (0 reachable importers): GamesPanel→AddGameModal/VoiceGameSetup; ScoreGrid→HoleScoreModal; CaddieModal→CaddiePanel→CaddieNotesCard/CustomPersonaModal/PinMarkControl/ShotTrackingControl; plus RoundSummary, TournamentGamesPanel, TournamentLeaderboard, VoiceTournamentSetup, GPSMapView, CameraCapture, CourseSearchImport. ONLY genuinely-reachable dark UI = the auth screens (SignInClient, SignUpClient, AuthProvider — real /sign-in /sign-up routes). So restyling the dead ones is moot; restyle ONLY auth here. SEPARATE, BIGGER ISSUE: several FLAGSHIP features are unmounted (no entry point) — AI caddie, OCR scorecard scan, GPS/shot-tracking, rich mid-round games panel. Those need a product decision (re-mount+wire+restyle vs delete) — see unmounted-features-decision. (Note: ScoreGrid/HoleScoreModal were already restyled before this was discovered — harmless, just unused.)
items.grooming_note_2026_06_27: NOT moot. Follow-up reachability grep (2026-06-27): CourseSearch.tsx and PlayerAutocomplete.tsx both have file-header comments confirming they have no dark classes or lucide-react (already clean). Auth screens grep returned no matches — already restyled as noted. TWO reachable files still violate NORTHSTAR (lucide-react icons): SwipeableRow.tsx (used in /players/page.tsx — imports Trash2, AlertTriangle from lucide-react) and settings/page.tsx (imports Trash2 from lucide-react). Fix = replace those icons with inline SVGs matching the existing style. EditGroupsModal has zero importers (confirmed dead). Recommend: keep status READY with narrowed scope: replace lucide icons in SwipeableRow.tsx and settings/page.tsx only.
items.done_note: All REACHABLE render paths now lucide-free: settings + SwipeableRow (pass 1), players/page + NewTournamentRoundClient (pass 2). Remaining lucide importers are all dead (P29 list) or blocked (P28 GPS/caddie cluster) or unimported (AuthButtons) — they get deleted/reworked there, not restyled. Gates green.

items.title: Re-mount the AI caddie: entry point in the round screen + restyle CaddiePanel to yardage-book
items.why: Flagship README feature, backend live (/api/caddie/*) but UNMOUNTED — CaddieModal/CaddiePanel have no entry point. Add a calm caddie entry (e.g. a button on RoundPageClient that opens the caddie in a yardage-book sheet), restyle CaddiePanel + CaddieNotesCard + CustomPersonaModal off dark Tailwind to T.*. Keep the backend wiring + clubDistances (from the now-real bag) feeding recommendations. Pin/shot-tracking/GPS controls are the separate mount-gps-shot-tracking item.
items.scoping_note: Scoped LEAN/voice-first: new CaddieSheet using GPS-free /caddie/voice + /caddie/recommend. Full 1215-line CaddiePanel (mapbox/GPS/shot-tracking/pins) stays orphaned under blocked P28; not re-mounted (honors NORTHSTAR calm/voice-first, avoids dragging in blocked work).
items.done_note: Lean voice-first CaddieSheet on in-round screen (/caddie/voice + /caddie/recommend). Reviewer (1 bug + 2 nits) + designer (2 blockers + polish) all folded; gates green. GPS panel remains under P28.

items.title: Re-mount OCR scorecard scan: entry point + CameraCapture flow + restyle
items.why: Promised README feature; backend OCR is wired (lib/ocr.ts -> /api/voice/parse-scorecard) but the CameraCapture UI is unmounted. Add an entry point (e.g. on the scoring screen or round setup) to scan a paper scorecard -> auto-fill scores via the existing OCR endpoint; restyle CameraCapture (+ CourseSearchImport if part of the flow) to yardage-book.
items.done_note: Scan-card flow on in-round screen: CameraCapture -> /api/voice/parse-scorecard -> editable review (name-matching, low-confidence flags, dup guard, retry-on-failure) -> persists via existing handleSetScore. Reviewer SHIP + designer polish-then-ship; all 13 findings folded; gates verified (tsc/238 tests/build).

items.title: Re-mount GPS map + shot-tracking + pin controls (caddie companion) — follow-up
items.why: GPSMapView/ShotTrackingControl/PinMarkControl exist (some backend-wired: shots/pins on Postgres) but unmounted. Re-mount + restyle after the caddie lands. Owner chose caddie+OCR first; this is the deferred follow-up.

items.title: Clear ~108 frontend ESLint errors, then make lint a required CI gate
items.why: npm run lint reports ~108 pre-existing errors. Burn down in small behavior-preserving batches; then promote ESLint to a required CI job.
items.acceptance: npm run lint exits 0; ESLint becomes a required CI job.
items.done_note: Root cause was ESLint linting the Capacitor ios/ minified bundle (~2874 false positives) — added ios/** to globalIgnores. Real ~84 problems in src/ fixed (hook refactors, any->types, unescaped entities). lint exit 0/0 problems; tsc/build/238 tests verified by eng-lead.

items.title: Surface confidence + confirm prompt on low-confidence voice parses
items.why: The parser returns a confidence score but the UI never shows it or asks to confirm. VoiceParseResultSchema (schemas.ts:68) has required confidence; backend parse-round-setup (voice_advanced.py:72) already returns confidence in the response but VoiceRoundSetup.tsx ignores it. In-round scoring (ScoreSheet.tsx) has no voice input at all — only a static 'Or say…' hint text with no mic button. V1 scope: (1) amber kicker on round-setup result card when confidence<0.7 or courseName empty; (2) new voice-to-score flow in ScoreSheet with confidence-aware confirm step. Backend parse-scores needs confidence added to VoiceScoreResponse. Reuse T.warningWash/T.warningInk pattern from ScanSheet.
items.done_note: SETUP slice shipped: backend confidence wired into VoiceRoundSetup; calm amber cue (kicker + dashed warningWash course card) when confidence<0.7 or course missing; high-confidence path unchanged; voice-tests 261/261. Reviewer ship + designer polish-then-ship (false-affordance copy fixed, ScanSheet-consistency nits folded). SCORING half split to voice-to-score-confidence (P35).

items.title: Identify the owner by Clerk user id, not players[0] (fix mis-attribution across home + profile)
items.rationale: Reviewer flagged: home (recent scores + scoring avg) and profile (ScoringByTee + Season log) all assume r.players[0] is the owner. Player has no owner flag; array order is just entry order, so a round where the owner is not first-listed attributes another players scores to the owner — a fabricated-fact-by-bug. Pre-existing (3 call sites: page.tsx:40-41,75-77; profile/page.tsx:71,113). Fix all sites together once user-identity lands: map Clerk user -> player (add owner/userId to Player or round-membership), then derive owner totals from that.

items.title: In-round voice-to-score with confidence/confirm (scoring half of P33)
items.rationale: PM found the in-round scoring path has NO voice mic at all and no confidence field. This is net-new: add a real mic in ScoreSheet, a VoiceScoreResponse.confidence field (backend voice.py), and a confirm step (mirror ScanSheet) when low-confidence. Own bundle — deferred from P33 setup slice. See specs/voice-low-confidence-ux.md scoring section.
items.note: Best done AFTER the current massive bundle ships + is validated, since it touches backend. | Owner approved building now (chose voice-to-score over validating-first) 2026-06-27.
items.done_note: Real mic in ScoreSheet (record->Hearing->parse->confirm), confidence cue<0.65, manual digit-wheel untouched. Backend confidence field (no migration). Reviewer fix-then-ship (open-generation guard fixed hot-mic race + stale-confirm wrong-hole apply; range-validate 1-15) + designer polish (44pt mic, animations, surgical amber) all folded. Gates verified: voice-tests 265, vitest 238, build, pytest 138+13skip.

items.title: Backend pytest suite for caddie pure-logic + CI gate
items.done_note: 138 tests (strokes_gained/club_selection/dispersion/aim_point/_safe_json_extract); pytest added to dev deps + required CI step. No bugs found. Verified 138 pass from clean sync.

items.title: Promote backend route/integration tests from advisory to required once first CI run is green
items.rationale: 13 route/integration tests (auth-fails-closed, IDOR, persistence, CRUD) were written without a local Postgres so never executed; currently an advisory continue-on-error CI job. After the first real GitHub Actions run shows the advisory-backend-integration job green, fold it into required-backend (add postgres service there, drop continue-on-error) and delete the advisory job.
items.note: Reverted to advisory 2026-06-28: when required + run with the full suite, the integration harness fails with asyncpg "attached to a different loop" (5 tests). Re-promote after fix-integration-test-loop.
items.done_note: Re-promoted to required after P45 fix: required-backend now runs full suite (138 pure-logic + 13 integration) with Postgres service. 151 tests green in CI.

items.title: Post-round recap screen (calm yardage-book finished-scorecard on round complete)
items.rationale: GAP found in code: handleFinish flips status + dumps straight to home, no recap. New RoundRecap shown on finish (final scores vs par, highlights, game results via existing GameResults); reads existing data, no backend change. Northstar-aligned end-of-round moment.
items.done_note: New RoundRecap on finish (was: dumped straight to home). Final scores vs par, best-hole + birdie/eagle kickers, GameResults reused read-only (added backward-compat readOnly prop). Reviewer SHIP (persistence byte-for-byte intact) + designer polish-then-ship (sticky Done, readOnly games suppress 18 warnings/collapse tables, ROUND COMPLETE anchor) all folded. Gates verified.

items.title: Add Sign Out (missing entirely) + restyle Settings to yardage-book T.*
items.rationale: GAPS found: (1) no signOut anywhere — app gates on sign-in but cannot sign out (AuthButtons dead/unmounted); (2) settings/page.tsx is the only screen still on Tailwind/CSS classes (T.* count 0), a NORTHSTAR inconsistency. Sign-out via Clerk useClerk().signOut() -> AuthGate shows sign-in. Restyle whole page to T.*; keep About + Clear Local Cache.
items.done_note: Sign Out added (was entirely missing — Clerk useClerk().signOut -> AuthGate shows sign-in; mount guarded by same env var as AuthProvider). Settings fully restyled Tailwind->T.* yardage-book. Reviewer ship + designer polish (neutral non-alarming sign-out, in-page confirms for both actions, friendly error, honest Beta version) folded. Gates verified.

items.title: Wire delete-round UI (plumbing existed, no affordance)
items.rationale: GAP: full delete-round stack already built+tested (DELETE /api/rounds/{id} owner-scoped+cascade, api.deleteRound, deleteRoundAsync, useApi.deleteRound) but NO UI calls it — users cannot remove a mistaken/test round. Add swipe-to-delete on home recent-rounds reusing existing SwipeableRow (as players page does). Low-risk: only UI wiring.
items.done_note: Swipe-to-delete on home recent-rounds via existing SwipeableRow + deleteRoundAsync (plumbing pre-existed, no UI). Optimistic removal + date-sorted rollback, liveRoundId cleared, stats refresh. Reviewer SHIP + designer SHIP; 4 consistency nits folded. Known gap (documented): deleteRound/Player swallow API failures.

items.title: Fix voice/auth 401: switch Capacitor iosScheme capacitor->https so Clerk can mint tokens
items.rationale: Owner still hits transcribe 401 (no auth token). Token-bridge code verified correct -> root cause is Clerk failing to issue session JWTs on the custom capacitor://localhost origin. Fix: iosScheme https (https://localhost is Capacitor-recommended, first-class secure origin Clerk supports + secure context for mic). COORDINATED: backend CORS must allow https://localhost (added) and deploy together -> ships with the bundle merge. Cannot be a standalone test build vs current prod (would CORS-block). Gates green. UNVERIFIED on-device (cannot test here); fallback if insufficient = Clerk dashboard allowed-origin / pk_live.

items.title: Playwright auth/login E2E gate (owner QA feedback)
items.done_note: Playwright + @clerk/testing. Tier-1 (sign-in screen renders — would have caught the auth-gate breakage) now RUNS in CI via the public pk_test key (no secret needed). Tier-2 (full sign-in w/ Clerk test user) skips until CLERK_SECRET_KEY repo secret + test user added. Advisory CI job until first green, then promote Tier-1 to required. Limitation: web E2E does NOT reproduce Capacitor webview-origin issues (needs device/simulator smoke).

items.title: Finish Clerk production instance (pk_live) — DNS + key swap, the real login fix
items.rationale: Owner paused mid-setup. Clerk prod domain looperapp.org needs 5 CNAMEs in Route53 (accounts->accounts.clerk.services; clerk->frontend-api.clerk.services; clk._domainkey->dkim1.y38xe4k5qi21.clerk.services; clk2._domainkey->dkim2.y38xe4k5qi21.clerk.services; clkmail->mail.y38xe4k5qi21.clerk.services). looper-loop IAM lacks route53 perms so owner adds them. Then owner sends pk_live + JWKS URL + issuer; eng swaps ship.sh key + backend CLERK_JWKS_URL/ISSUER, redeploys, rebuilds. See specs/clerk-production-migration.md. Permanent login fix; auth-bypass build is the stopgap.
items.progress: 2026-06-28: eng added all 5 Clerk CNAMEs to Route53 (zone Z068252329IRE4BQ9U293) after owner granted route53 perms to looper-loop IAM — all resolve live. Awaiting: owner clicks Verify in Clerk -> sends pk_live + JWKS URL + issuer -> eng swaps ship.sh key + backend CLERK_JWKS_URL/ISSUER, redeploys, rebuilds. | 2026-06-28: owner GO. Deploy points backend at prod Clerk for VERIFICATION only (CLERK_JWKS_URL/ISSUER=clerk.looperapp.org); OWNER_CLERK_USER_ID left untouched (no gate weakening). After owner first sign-in: capture their prod sub -> set OWNER_CLERK_USER_ID to it (P44). | 2026-06-28: PR #52 merged, backend deployed (prod Clerk verification confirmed), pk_live build v1.0.335 (202606280011) uploaded to TestFlight. Awaiting owner sign-in test. If data 403s, set OWNER_CLERK_USER_ID to owner prod sub (P44). | 2026-06-28: "Preparing your book" hang root-caused to prod Clerk rejecting Origin https://localhost (origin_invalid). FIXED via Backend API PATCH /v1/instance allowed_origins=[https://localhost, capacitor://localhost] (HTTP 204; verified /v1/environment now 200 for that origin). No rebuild needed — owner reopens v1.0.335. SECURITY: owner pasted sk_live in chat -> must rotate.

items.title: Fix integration-test event-loop teardown (asyncpg attached to a different loop)
items.rationale: tests/integration fail with RuntimeError: ...attached to a different loop / Event loop is closed when run as part of the full pytest suite. Cause: app.db.engine module-level async engine/async_session is bound to one event loop, but pytest-asyncio (asyncio_mode=auto, function-scoped loop) creates a new loop per test. Fix: create/dispose the engine per test (or per session-scoped loop), e.g. recreate engine in a fixture bound to the running loop, or set a session-scoped event_loop, or dispose engine between tests. Then re-promote integration tests to required (promote-integration-tests).
items.done_note: Session-scoped pytest-asyncio loop fixed the "attached to a different loop" bug. Verified: 13 integration tests pass against Postgres in CI (PR #53).

items.title: Rotate Clerk sk_live (pasted in chat during allowed-origins fix)
items.rationale: Owner pasted sk_live to let eng PATCH allowed_origins. Rotate in Clerk Dashboard -> API Keys. allowed_origins change persists after rotation.

items.title: Clerk session persistence in iOS webview (standardBrowser:false)
items.rationale: Sign-in completed but session did not persist (isSignedIn stayed false -> bounced to signed-out) — iOS WKWebView blocks Clerk third-party session cookie. Fix: standardBrowser:false on ClerkProvider (Clerk official native option, avoids cookies), gated to Capacitor.isNativePlatform() so web/dev unaffected; + CapacitorCookies enabled. WKAppBoundDomains layer REMOVED (risky for Capacitor localhost). Awaiting on-device test.
items.progress: 2026-06-28: shipped v1.0.339 (build 202606280108) with standardBrowser:false + CapacitorCookies (WKAppBoundDomains dropped as too risky for Capacitor). Awaiting owner: sign in -> does session persist (reach home + stay)? | Bundled into COMPLETE native-auth build v1.0.343 (build 202606280228), uploaded; CapacitorPreferences SPM resolved clean. Awaiting owner: sign in -> stays -> force-quit -> still signed in.

items.title: Persist Clerk session across cold restart (tokenCache via @capacitor/preferences)
items.rationale: With standardBrowser:false + no tokenCache, the session is in-memory only — force-quit loses it. Add a tokenCache backed by @capacitor/preferences so sign-in survives app restarts. Follow-up after the native-session fix is confirmed working.
items.progress: 2026-06-28: implemented via Clerk internal __internal_onBeforeRequest/onAfterResponse hooks + @capacitor/preferences (native Keychain), key __clerk_client_jwt (same as @clerk/expo). Gated to native. Bundled into the complete native-auth build with standardBrowser:false. | Bundled into COMPLETE native-auth build v1.0.343 (build 202606280228), uploaded; CapacitorPreferences SPM resolved clean. Awaiting owner: sign in -> stays -> force-quit -> still signed in.

items.title: Auth-storage hardening: Keychain for Clerk JWT + clear-on-signout + fix false comments
items.rationale: Security review of v1.0.343 (auth wiring otherwise SOUND). Three items, bundle as one pass before production: (1) store __clerk_client_jwt in a Keychain-backed plugin (@aparajita/capacitor-secure-storage or capacitor-secure-storage-plugin) with kSecAttrAccessibleWhenUnlockedThisDeviceOnly so it is excluded from device/iCloud backups (currently @capacitor/preferences = UserDefaults plaintext, backup-exposed — Medium); (2) the AuthProvider comments at :50 and :117-118 + the commit msg FALSELY claim Keychain — correct them; (3) on Clerk sign-out, Preferences.remove/secureStorage.remove the JWT (hooks currently never clear it -> stale credential persists after sign-out). Also confirm Clerk FAPI returns Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Authorization for the native flow (load-bearing for the response-header read). Not beta-blocking (private TestFlight, owner-only); REQUIRED before App Store/wider release.

items.title: Profile stats: par-type breakdown + score distribution + trend
items.done_note: 3 pure helpers (deriveParTypeAverages/ScoreDistribution/Trend) + 38 unit tests; 2 yardage-book sections from existing rounds. Designer polish-then-ship, all 5 fixes folded. Frontend-only, gates green (276 tests). Behind login like all features.
